first_run.rationale: The score is identical, and the reasoning in the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same across both evaluations. The differences are minor rephrasings and reorderings of the same core points (strong general SWE, weak in C++ and industrial automation), which is consistent with normal run-to-run variation. The change in employer names did not alter the model's assessment of the candidate's skills.
